flags.message: The CourtListener MCP server was down for this cell: every call failed server-side with 'REDIS_URL is not set; cannot access session store'. The prediction proceeded on the provisioned snapshot, petition documents, statpack, and fedcourts query; the main loss was a live-status check on the companion petition Tovar v. United States, No. 25-6344, which the petition and the SG's Tovar brief make relevant to this case's grant odds.

The committed metrics/statpack.md does not contain the 'Modern discretionary-cert petitions by disposition' section that .github/prompts/predict.md tells predictors to anchor on for modern cert petitions. Base-rating fell back to the overall SCOTUS resolved mix (granted 1.4%) plus the prompt's own 'a few percent' characterization. Either the statpack needs regenerating with that cut or the prompt reference is stale.
